sentences.translationEn: Muhammad wrote a message by email.

sentences.translation: Napisao je adresu, temu i poruku.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote the address, subject, and message.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ الرِّسَالَةَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى قَبْلَ إِرْسَالِهَا.
sentences.translation: Pročitao je poruku još jednom prije slanja.
sentences.translationEn: He read the message once more before sending it.

sentences.translation: Pritisnuo je pošalji i završio posao.
sentences.translationEn: He pressed send and finished the work.
